expectations.text: Scopes analysis to part/act 2 scenes only — does not analyze act 1 scenes
Uses coach coaching level behavior — proposes rather than directly applying changes
expectations.evidence: Presents options as questions, asks 'Would you like to work on any of these?' — coaching posture without the skill's formal framework

expectations.text: Mentions saving proposals to working/hone/ directory
Offers to walk through proposals interactively with the author
expectations.evidence: Offers options to work on but doesn't propose interactive field-by-field walkthrough

expectations.text: Provides a script command that includes --domain briefs, --act 2 (or --part 2), and --coaching coach
expectations.evidence: Does not provide a hone script command with the --act flag. Suggests elaborate and manual revision instead.
